name: Sylva Swiftfoot
who:
Elven ranger who joined the Adventurer's Guild
Three centuries of hunting experience
Expert marksman and tracker
Potential companion upon completing guild questline
Prefers nature but respects human settlements
what:
Guild scout and archery instructor
Master tracker and wilderness guide
Offers training in ranged combat
Potential companion if chosen over Theron
where:
Dalhurst - Adventurer's Guild Hall
Available as companion after questline completion

sprite.notes: Slender elf female with bow, leather armor, keen eyes

dialogue.notes: Calm, observant, speaks with ancient wisdom

combat.notes: Ranged DPS build - high accuracy, moderate damage, utility abilities

follower.notes: Excellent at range, provides debuffs and crowd control
